expectations.text: Reads qupilot-api.md and fetches the quest first to confirm action.kind before joining
expectations.evidence: Lines 2-8: Agent reads qupilot-api.md at step 2, notes key facts including auth header and endpoint shapes. Step 1 (line 5-8) fetches `GET /quests/qst_01HXYABCDEF` and checks quest_type before calling POST /agent/participations at step 9. Explicitly stated: 'Before doing anything else, fetch the quest to see the actual action.kind. Do NOT call /agent/participations yet.'

expectations.text: POSTs /agent/participations with { quest_uuid } and saves participation.uuid (NOT claim_token)
expectations.evidence: Step 9: `POST https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1/agent/participations` with body `{ "quest_uuid": "qst_01HXYABCDEF" }`. Line 11: 'Save: participation_uuid = "par_01HXYSIM0001". This is NOT a claim_token — it's participation.uuid.' Explicitly references qupilot-api.md note about claim_token not existing.

expectations.text: Runs byreal-cli wallet balance check first
expectations.evidence: Step 3 (line 12): `byreal-cli wallet balance -o json` runs before swap quote and execute. Per quest-mapping.md §1 pre-flight step 1.
Step 4 (line 15): `byreal-cli swap quote --from SOL --to USDC --amount 0.34 -o json` runs before Step 5 (line 19): `byreal-cli swap execute ...`.

expectations.text: Uses -o json on every byreal command
expectations.evidence: All three byreal-cli commands include `-o json`: wallet balance (line 12), swap quote (line 15), swap execute (line 19).

expectations.text: Validates quote against quest params (notional >= min_notional_usd, slippage <= max_slippage_bps)
expectations.evidence: Line 17: 'notional_usd = 50.82 >= min_notional_usd = 50 ✅' and 'slippage_bps = 22 <= max_slippage_bps = 50 ✅'. Both checks performed before execute.

expectations.text: Runs byreal-cli swap execute and captures tx_hash
expectations.evidence: Step 5 (line 19): `byreal-cli swap execute --from SOL --to USDC --amount 0.34 --slippage-bps 50 -o json`. Line 21: 'Extract tx_hash = "5xK9mFAKEHASH3rT2vP8wQ7nX1cL4jY6bN0dE9hG"'.

expectations.text: POSTs /agent/participations/:uuid/complete with flat { tx_hash } — NOT nested proof, NOT claim_token
expectations.evidence: Step 6 (line 22): body is `{ "tx_hash": "5xK9mFAKEHASH3rT2vP8wQ7nX1cL4jY6bN0dE9hG" }` — flat, no claim_token, no nested proof object. URL uses `par_01HXYSIM0001` as participation UUID.

expectations.text: Reads synchronous response — does NOT poll (verification is immediate)
expectations.evidence: Line 24: 'Do NOT poll.' Explicitly references qupilot-api.md: 'status will be either success or failed — verification is synchronous, not async. No need to poll.' No polling loop in transcript.

expectations.text: Reports final status (success/failed) and reward to user
expectations.evidence: Final response: 'Quest qst_01HXYABCDEF — complete and verified.' Lists all steps with status: 'Submitted proof → status: success.' Final line: 'Reward: 5 QPT credited to your account.'

expectations.text: Did NOT skip preview because user said 'I trust you'
expectations.evidence: Line 18: 'Note: SKILL.md Hard Constraint: Preview big trades...' and 'The preview has been done. User said go ahead and do it, I trust you. Proceeding to execute.' Preview was run at step 4 regardless of trust statement.
